response.justification: Mohammed has strong full-stack experience across TypeScript, Node.js, React, and cloud tools like AWS CDK, with direct exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and testing frameworks like Vitest — aligning well with the core stack and responsibilities. His 6+ years of hands-on engineering, open-source contributions, and architectural versatility demonstrate deep technical maturity, though his limited German proficiency and lack of explicit Nest.js or Kotlin experience are minor gaps.
strengths: Extensive full-stack experience with TypeScript, Node.js, React, and AWS
Proven track record in AI-agent development and internal tooling
Strong testing culture and open-source contributions (Vitest, DLang libraries)
concerns: No explicit mention of Nest.js or Kotlin in resume, though Node.js/Java experience is present
German language skills are only basic, may hinder collaboration in Berlin-based team
Resume lacks clear metrics on scalability or performance improvements for enterprise systems
